preflight.note: Created before implementation work starts. Re-vendors RepoPact 1.8.0 after contributing ForgeLink's deferred/rejected decision statuses upstream, and drops the now-redundant local carry.

acceptance_criteria.text: Re-vendor RepoPact 1.8.0 into the vendored tree: take upstream 1.8.0 for plan_import.py, takeover.py, track_import.py, and record-frontmatter.schema.json; adopt the native deferred+rejected DECISION_STATUSES in validate_repo.py while preserving the preflight extension; bump the pins (scripts/REPOPACT_VERSION, requirements-repopact.txt, audits/registry.json) to 1.8.0.

Drop the interim 'deferred' decision-status carry (ForgeLink decision 0014) now that deferred and rejected ship natively in RepoPact 1.8.0; update scripts/LOCAL_EXTENSIONS.md so the only remaining carried patch is the preflight marker.
Both python scripts/validate_repo.py and python .local/validate_system.py pass on the tree, with decision 0013 validating against the native 'deferred' status (no local carry).
